identity.title: My Soul Lives In Seoul
identity.styleSentence: A high-energy, danceable anthem at 104 BPM blending glossy K-Pop production with a reggaeton dembow groove, featuring punchy 808s, tropical synth plucks, and multilingual vocal chops that transition from smooth pop-rap verses to bright, stacked harmony choruses.
identity.vocalStyle: Cute romantic male/female duet with playful rap exchanges

lyrics.text:
[Title: My Soul Lives In Seoul]

[Intro: Soft K-Pop Synths, Phone Notification Sounds]
Yeah
My soul lives in Seoul
But my heart lives wherever you call me from

[Female Vocal]
안녕, 내 사랑
Can you hear me now?

[Male Vocal]
Signal’s weak
But I feel you somehow

[Both]
Time zones, touch screens
Different skies, same dreams

[Build]
One, two, three, go

[Verse 1: Male Lead, Smooth Pop Rap]
I wake up, grab my phone before I even breathe
Thirty-seven messages waiting there for me
Your morning is my midnight, my sunrise is your sleep
But your face on my screen makes the distance feel sweet

Wi-Fi acting crazy, signal dropping low
“Can you hear me, baby?” then the camera froze
Front cam, back cam, why am I showing the floor?
You laughing so hard, now I love you even more

Battery on red, charger disappeared
Wrong cable in my bag, same problem all year
Storage full again from the photos that you send
But I still save every selfie like I’ll never see you again

[Pre-Chorus: Female Lead]
Shipping takes forever, plane tickets are high
Currency conversion got me asking why
Forms on the table, stamps in a line
But I’d cross every border just to call you mine

[Both: Rising Harmonies]
K-1, K-2, CR-1 too
Paperwork dancing like it’s got moves
Lost in translation, but I still choose you
Every little problem turns into something cute

[Chorus: Big K-Pop Hook]
My soul lives in Seoul
But my love goes worldwide
From your good morning
To my good night

We fight, we make up
Then we laugh on the phone
No matter where you are
You never feel alone

내 영혼은 서울에 살아
Ne yeonghoneun Seoul-e sara
But it finds you wherever you go

보고 싶어, my baby
Bogo sipeo, my baby
My soul lives in Seoul

[Post-Chorus: Dance Pop Chant]
Oh-oh-oh, Seoul to your heart
Oh-oh-oh, miles apart
Oh-oh-oh, still we glow
My soul lives in Seoul

Oh-oh-oh, call me again
Oh-oh-oh, don’t let it end
Oh-oh-oh, you already know
My soul lives in Seoul

[Verse 2: Female Lead, Cute Pop Flow]
Family asking questions, friends all in the chat
“Is the foreigner rich?” Baby, what is that?
Everybody thinks love comes with a golden crown
But we’re just counting coins till the next flight down

You send me a box, it arrives next year
Customs got me crying, but I smile when it’s here
T-shirts, snacks, letters, little things you drew
I keep them like treasure cause they came from you

Language barrier? We turn it into jokes
I say one wrong word and the whole call explodes
Different food, different rules, different ways to show we care
But your culture feels like music when you let me meet you there

[Pre-Chorus 2: Male Lead]
Tired thumbs from typing all night
Tired voice from “one more call” till daylight
Missed calls, small fights, pride in the way
Then one heart emoji saves the whole day

[Both]
You screenshot me sleeping, I screenshot you mad
We got duplicate pictures of the best days we had
Backup the memories, new phone, same us
Too many photos, not enough touch

[Chorus: Bigger, More Harmonies]
My soul lives in Seoul
But my love goes worldwide
From your good morning
To my good night

We fight, we make up
Then we laugh on the phone
No matter where you are
You never feel alone

내 영혼은 서울에 살아
Ne yeonghoneun Seoul-e sara
But it finds you wherever you go

보고 싶어, my baby
Bogo sipeo, my baby
My soul lives in Seoul

[Korean Rap Battle: Cute Boyfriend vs Girlfriend]

[Male Korean Rapper]
야, 내 양말은 바닥에 한 번뿐이야
Ya, nae yangmareun badage han beonppuniya
Your hair is everywhere, girl, 진짜 장난 아니야
Jinjja jangnan aniya
설거지는 산처럼 쌓여 있는데
Seolgeojineun sancheoreom ssayeo inneunde
You say “oppa, later,” then you buy one more thing

[Female Korean Rapper]
뭐? 너는 돈 없다면서 치킨은 또 시켜
Mwo? Neoneun don eopdamyeonseo chicken-eun tto sikyeo
게임은 새로 사고 내 말은 또 미뤄
Game-eun saero sago nae mareun tto mirwo
내 머리카락? 사랑의 흔적이야
Nae meorikarak? Sarang-ui heunjeogiya
네 양말 냄새는 거의 전설이야

[Male Rapper]
Okay, okay, maybe I’m messy

[Female Rapper]
Maybe I shop when I’m stressy

[Male Rapper]
You blame me for the belly

[Female Rapper]
You made me love your food already

[Both Korean Rap]
우리 둘 다 살쪘어, 하하, 괜찮아
Uri dul da saljjyeosseo, haha, gwaenchana
너의 나라, 나의 나라, 맛있잖아
Neoui nara, naui nara, masitjana
싸워도 웃고, 다시 안아
Ssawodo utgo, dasi ana
사랑은 배불러도 계속 가잖아

[Reggaeton Section: Dembow Beat Drops, Spanish Vocal]
[Male Reggaeton Vocal]
Dale, dale, mi amor, aunque lejos estamos
El vuelo cuesta caro, pero igual lo soñamos
Se cae la señal, pero sube el corazón
Tu voz en mi teléfono me cambia la canción

Cambio de moneda, papeles en la mesa
Visa, entrevista, paciencia y promesa
Tu familia pregunta, mis panas también
Pero nadie entiende lo que tú y yo tenemos, ven

[Female Reggaeton Vocal]
Baila conmigo por la pantalla
Aunque la cámara nunca se halla
Batería baja, cargador perdido
Pero este amor sigue encendido

[Both]
Dale suave, dale lento
Love across every continent
Dale fuerte, dale true
Every rhythm brings me back to you

[Japanese Rap Section: Tight Flow, Glitchy Synths]
[Japanese Rapper]
時差を越えて、また君へ送信
Jisa wo koete, mata kimi e soushin
眠い目こすって、開

analysis.summary: This playful yet heartfelt K-Pop anthem chronicles a long-distance relationship navigating time zones, cultural barriers, and logistical hurdles like customs and currency. It blends multilingual vocals from Korean to Spanish and Japanese rap battles into a global love story where digital connection bridges physical distance.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A glowing neon sign in deep blue night sky with soft pink cherry blossom petals floating around a smartphone screen displaying a map pin.
Faint green bars wavering on a cracked phone screen against a backdrop of stormy grey clouds and distant city lights fading into darkness.
A passport stamp glowing gold under a spotlight, with paper documents flying like confetti in the air above a chaotic but joyful airport terminal floor.
Piles of laundry and takeout boxes forming colorful mountains under warm kitchen lighting, with socks dancing mid-air in slow motion.
A large cardboard box marked 'International' sitting on a dusty floor next to a crying but smiling face reflected in the polished metal of luggage scales.
A giant floating heart symbol made of soft pink light connecting two silhouettes across an ocean, replacing a broken fiber optic cable.

dropMap.hint: cuts → blackout/cut-mode moments; risers → supernova build-ups (stemSense activeCut/activeRiser fire these automatically)
